top_signals.title: US Treasury issues new Iran sanctions targeting crypto exchanges - Reuters
top_signals.summary: US Treasury issues new Iran sanctions targeting crypto exchanges  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Vietnam inflation rises to 2020 high; trade deficit widens on fuel costs
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Google adds Android protection against AI deepfake scam calls
top_signals.summary: Google is introducing a new Android security feature that will detect and flag phone calls in which scammers use artificial intelligence to impersonate a user's personal contacts. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Revolut’s US bank to offer stablecoin services alongside FDIC-insured products: Reuters
top_signals.summary: Revolut U.S. CEO Cetin Duransoy told Reuters the company plans to offer access to stablecoins in the United States.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: SpaceX targets fixed $135 IPO roadshow price at $1.75 trillion valuation, source says
top_signals.summary: The valuation would make Elon Musk's company the seventh- biggest in the U.S. and above Tesla, which has a market cap of about $1.6 trillion.

top_signals.title: Cork Gully Appoints Dr. Jesko Kornemann as Partner to Lead Germany Expansion
top_signals.summary: Cork Gully is pleased to announce the appointment of Dr. Jesko Kornemann as Partner, marking the firm’s expansion into Germany and strengthening its capabilities in special situations, fund-related advisory and asset management across the DACH region. Based in Frankfurt, Jesko brings significant experience advising fund managers, investors and stakeholders on tail-end and challenged investment funds, [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Glencore restarts Cerrejón after rail blockade
top_signals.summary: Colombia's largest coal mine resumes operations as recurring disruptions continue to threaten output and investment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Suspect in Tochigi robbery-murder who fled abroad ordered to return passport
top_signals.summary: Kazuhiko Masuda, the suspected orchestrator of a robbery-murder in Tochigi Prefecture, is believed to be in Southeast Asia.

top_signals.title: Glencore’s Cerrejón shutdown deepens pressure on Colombia coal
top_signals.summary: Community blockade halts Glencore mine as investors bet election could reshape Colombia's resource sector.
